backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Voter Management System that includes blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes CRUD operations for voters, user profiles (with role-based access), and tasks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that useGetCallerUserProfile.ts and App.tsx were audited to gate profile queries behind strict auth and actor readiness checks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a reference for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Voter Management System' that mounts the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing a six-phase sequential auth state machine: initializing, unauthenticated, profile loading, profile setup, role validation, and full app render.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI that displays the user's principal ID and a logout button for users who lack a valid role.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedSearchFi: Collapsible search and filter panel for the voter list supporting basic text search and advanced dropdowns for gender, caste, area, and other demographic fields.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main application layout component that manages page navigation state and renders a responsive sidebar with mobile overlay alongside the active page content.
frontend/src/components/CreateTaskForm.t: Modal form component for creating and assigning tasks, supporting title, description, deadline, role assignment, and file attachments with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/DistributionChar: Reusable chart component that renders either a bar or pie chart for distribution data using Recharts, with percentage annotations and consistent theming.
frontend/src/components/DocumentUploadFi: File upload field component for PDF/JPEG/PNG documents with drag-and-drop area, upload progress display, file validation, and multi-file support.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadField: Single-image upload field component with preview, upload progress, file type/size validation, and remove functionality for JPEG/PNG images.
frontend/src/components/LabelPrintView.t: Dialog component that displays voter mailing labels in a paginated grid (10 per page) and triggers the browser print dialog with print-specific CSS styles.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication, handling login state, errors, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays a modal form for new users to set their name and role, saving the profile via a mutation and noting that the first registrant becomes Admin.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the app sidebar with navigation links, user profile info, a theme toggle, and a login/logout button.
Shows a dialog with full task details including title, description, assigned role, deadline, status badge, status updater, and downloadable attachments.
Renders a color-coded badge indicating a task's status (Pending, In Progress, or Completed).
frontend/src/components/TaskStatusUpdate: Provides a dropdown to update a task's status, visible only to the role assigned to the task, with optimistic revert on error.
frontend/src/components/TaskTable.tsx: Displays a paginated table of tasks with columns for title, description, assigned role, deadline, status badge, and attachment count; rows are clickable.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button that toggles between light and dark themes, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying it via a CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/components/VoterDetailModal: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a single voter, including photo, signature, personal details, and address fields using a grid layout.
frontend/src/components/VoterEntryForm.t: A form component for manually registering a new voter with fields for personal info, address, and file uploads (photo, signature, documents), using react-hook-form and the useAddVoter mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/VoterImportDialo: A dialog component that allows bulk importing voters from a CSV/Excel file, showing upload progress and a summary of successes, skips, and errors after import.
frontend/src/components/VoterTable.tsx: A table component that renders a paginated list of voters with columns for key fields, skeleton loading states, and row-click callbacks for detail view.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVoter.ts: A React Query mutation hook that calls the backend addVoter actor method with all voter fields and invalidates the voters query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssignTask.ts: A React Query mutation hook that calls the backend assignTask actor method with task details and invalidates the tasks query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend, returning null for unauthorized/anonymous callers and gating execution until the actor and identity are ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetTasks.ts: A React Query hook that fetches the list of tasks from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVoters.ts: A React Query hook that fetches all voters from the backend actor, with retry logic and loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves a user profile via the backend actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateTaskStatus.t: React Query mutation hook that updates a task's status via the backend actor and invalidates the tasks query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and print media styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that fetches voter data and renders distribution charts for gender, caste, education, office, and area using DistributionChart components.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying summary stat cards for total, male, female, and other voters fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/LabelPrinting.tsx: Label printing page that fetches voters, renders their address labels in a paginated grid, and triggers the browser print dialog.
frontend/src/pages/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the login page with a two-panel layout: a branded left panel showcasing VoterMS features and a right panel containing the login button and welcome text.
frontend/src/pages/TaskManagement.tsx: Displays a role-filtered task list page with options to create tasks (Admin/Supervisor only), view task details in a modal, and shows loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/VoterEntry.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the VoterEntryForm component for registering a new voter in the system.
frontend/src/pages/VoterList.tsx: Displays a filterable, searchable voter list with actions for CSV import/export, label printing, and refresh, plus a voter detail modal on row click.
frontend/src/utils/excelExport.ts: Exports an array of Voter objects to a UTF-8 CSV file with BOM, handling field escaping and triggering a browser download with a date-stamped filename.
frontend/src/utils/excelImport.ts: Parses a CSV file into an array of ParsedVoter objects, handling quoted fields, gender normalization, and skipping rows missing required Name or Voter ID fields.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens (background, primary, sidebar, chart, etc.), Inter/Rajdhani fonts, CSS-variable border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of an ICP app project, documenting a known bug where both `agent` and `agentOptions` are passed simultaneously to `createActor` causing 400 errors, along with existing and pending fix feature requests to resolve the conflict.
